description:
Update a specific timecard entry.

#### See - [Daily Log guide](https://developers.procore.com/documentation/daily-logs) - for additional info on
* Attachments

hours.description: Total number of hours worked (excluding breaks) for the timecard entry. This property is not applicable if the timesheet time entry is configured for start time and stop time.

lunch_time.description: The duration of the lunch break, in minutes, for the timecard entry. This property is only applicable if the tmesheet time entry is configured for start time and stop time.

party_id.description: The ID of the Party of the Timecard Entry

time_in.description: The start time of the timecard entry in ISO 8601 format. This property is only applicable if the timesheet time entry is configured for start time and stop time.

time_out.description: The stop time of the timecard entry in ISO 8601 format. This property is only applicable if the timesheet time entry is configured for start time and stop time.

billable.description: The billable status of the timecard entry. Must be either true or false.

date.description: The date of the timecard dntry in ISO 8601 format.

datetime.description: The date and time of the record. This property is mutually exclusive with the Date property.

description.description: The description of the timecard entry.

timecard_time_type_id.description: The ID of the timecard time type corresponding to the timecard entry.

cost_code_id.description: The ID of the cost code corresponding to the timecard entry.

login_information_id.description: The ID of the login information corresponding to the timecard entry.

timesheet_id.description: The ID of the timesheet corresponding to the timecard entry.

clock_in_id.description: The ID of the clock in GPS position corresponding to the timecard entry.

clock_out_id.description: The ID of the clock out GPS position corresponding to the timecard entry.

origin_id.description: The ID of the related external data.

origin_data.description: The value of the related external data.

line_item_type_id.description: The ID of the line item type pertaining to the time card entry.
